mapper.select: SELECT id, COALESCE(title, CONCAT('轮播图', id)) as title, image, COALESCE(link, '') as link, activity_id as activityId, sort, COALESCE(status, 1) as status, create_time as createdAt FROM carousel ORDER BY sort ASC, id DESC

SELECT id, COALESCE(title, CONCAT('轮播图', id)) as title, image, COALESCE(link, '') as link, activity_id as activityId, sort, COALESCE(status, 1) as status, create_time as createdAt FROM carousel WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO carousel (title, image, link, activity_id, sort, status, create_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{image}, #{link}, #{activityId}, #{sort}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE carousel SET title = #{title}, image = #{image}, link = #{link}, activity_id = #{activityId}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
